headline: The qke->FP64 precision-matrix promotion was implemented, verified to take effect (qke is genuinely float64 end-to-end through MYNN), and re-run on the d03 1km gated-fp32 case. It does NOT close the gate: d03 still goes NONFINITE at forecast hour 1 with qke the sole offending field and the SAME ~3036 cells (=~69 columns x 44 levels). The burst's root-cause hypothesis ('qke fp32 OVERFLOW at 1km') is FALSIFIED -- qke in fp64 diverges identically, at tiny qke magnitudes (~0.04-0.13, nowhere near any fp32/fp64 range limit). This is a STRUCTURAL/dynamics-driven NaN over the steep Tenerife terrain, not a precision-range problem. Reported FAIL, not green.
precision_mode: gated_fp32 (qke promoted FP64; theta/u/v/qv + bulk fields FP32_GATED; mu/p/ph/w + acoustic/pressure accumulators FP64)

change_applied.also: tests/test_m6_precision_matrix.py updated (qke moved gated->FP64-locked; Nc/Nn added to gated set, fixing a PRE-EXISTING test breakage); src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py A2C wind-increment scatter made dtype-safe (silences the now-fp64 du/dv downcast FutureWarning; no numerical change).
change_applied.fp64_take_effect_evidence: Direct GPU probe of the real d03 gated-fp32 case: PRECISION_MATRIX[qke]=(float64,False); namelist.force_fp64=False; t0 state.qke.dtype=float64; the MYNN column kernel output out.tke/out.qke is float64 (standalone + via the operational mynn_adapter). So the promotion is genuinely active on the d03 ship path.

full_24h_gated_fp32_run.instrument: scripts/d03_replay.py --gated-fp32 --hours 24 (the operational ship pipeline; NO clamp/mask -- execute_daily_pipeline raises PipelineBlocked on the first nonfinite hour)
full_24h_gated_fp32_run.note: IDENTICAL nonfinite signature (3036 cells, same finite min/max) to the pre-fix proofs/v090/d03_1km_validation.json -- the strongest evidence that fp64 changed nothing about the blow-up: the same cells diverge.

root_cause_localization.method: GPU micro-step probes on the real d03 gated-fp32 case (run_forecast_operational single-dt steps + MYNN-internals + real-mynn_adapter decomposition).
findings: qke is genuinely float64 at every checkpoint (state + MYNN kernel).

qke goes NONFINITE within ~2 coupled dt steps (=6 s model time) over ~67-69 specific columns (2948-3036 nonfinite cells = ~67-69 cols x 44 levels), i.e. column-localized to the steep Tenerife terrain.
At blow-up qke magnitudes are TINY (~0.04 -> 0.13, capped by the WRF-faithful mym_predict cap <=150); there is NO precision-range overflow.

On the LAST finite state (qke max 0.036, theta/u/v/ph all finite) the REAL operational mynn_adapter produces a FULLY FINITE qke (max 0.071) and finite diffusivities/tendencies (dfm/dfh/km/kh/el/qkw all finite). => the MYNN physics is NOT the NaN source on a finite input.

Yet a single coupled forecast step (dynamics acoustic/RK + boundary + MYNN-in-core) on that SAME finite state yields NONFINITE qke. The MYNN-in-core runs on the DYNAMICALLY-EVOLVED intermediate state, so the dynamics produces an unstable intermediate (extreme near-surface shear/theta over the 67-69 steep columns) that drives the in-core qke budget to NaN.
_mym_level2 gm/gh (shear/buoyancy), ustar, and dz0 stay FINITE through the blow-up, so the NaN is NOT a divide-by-tiny-dz in the level-2 gradients.
root_cause_localization.conclusion: The d03 1km hour-1 blow-up is a DYNAMICS-driven structural instability on the steep Tenerife terrain that surfaces in qke (the most sensitive field, an in-core MYNN diagnostic of the evolving wind/theta). It is NOT an fp32 precision-range overflow. Promoting qke (and its MYNN length-scale/TKE-budget intermediates, which fp64-promote with it via JAX type-promotion) to fp64 therefore cannot and does not close the gate.
root_cause_localization.fp64_reference: d03 1km is FINITE through 0.3h/360 steps in FULL fp64 (proofs/v090/d03_replay_finite_check.json) -- but that is full-fp64 on EVERY field including the dynamics mass/pressure path, AND only a 0.3h window. The gated-fp32 ship mode keeps the bulk wind/theta fp32; the dynamics-intermediate instability at 1km is not cured by qke fp64 alone. A genuinely-stable 1km gated-fp32 path needs a dynamics/numerics fix (1km CFL / steep-terrain stability), not a precision-matrix edit.

gate_status: OPEN -- d03 1km gated-fp32 24h all-timesteps-in-margins gate is NOT met. This remains a genuine open 0.9.0 validation gate.
all_timesteps_in_margins_vs_cpu_1km: NOT EVALUATED -- the forecast NaN'd at hour 1 before any wrfout was written, so no RMSE vs the corpus 1km wrfout could be computed.

carry_over.next_sprint: A real numerics/stability debugging sprint for the d03 1km gated-fp32 dynamics over steep terrain (NOT a precision-contract sprint). Concrete leads: (1) the in-core MYNN runs on the dynamically-evolved intermediate -- audit whether the gated-fp32 dynamics (fp32 u/v/theta with fp64 mu/p/ph) produces an unstable near-surface intermediate over the 67-69 steep columns at dt=3s/10 acoustic substeps; (2) try a 1km-appropriate dt / more acoustic substeps / stronger near-surface vertical-implicit treatment; (3) compare the gated-fp32 vs full-fp64 dynamics intermediate at the SAME step to isolate which fp32 dynamics field first diverges over those columns; (4) the column localization (~69 cols) should be cross-referenced to the steepest d03 terrain gradients.
carry_over.what_to_KEEP: The qke->FP64 promotion is harmless and arguably more correct for a turbulence budget outside the conserved path (qke is small; the d02 speedup is unaffected -- see proofs/v090/d02_recheck_qkefp64). It is retained as a defensible precision-contract improvement, but it MUST NOT be claimed to close the d03 gate.

honesty_note: This sprint's premise (fp32 qke overflow at 1km) was FALSIFIED by direct fp64 verification. Honesty over green: the gate is reported OPEN. The qke-fp64 change is committed because it is correct and harmless, but the real blocker is a dynamics-driven 1km steep-terrain instability that a precision-matrix change cannot fix.
